# CardStats

> CardStats is an independent global crypto-card catalog and comparison product. It helps people compare card eligibility, fees, rewards, funding models, payment networks, plans, tiers, and benefits without allowing commercial relationships to affect ordering.

Canonical site: https://www.cardstats.xyz

## Primary pages

- [Crypto card index](https://www.cardstats.xyz/cards): Browse the complete card-program catalog.
- [Crypto card comparison](https://www.cardstats.xyz/compare): Compare up to four card programs and their selectable plans or tiers.
- [Market analytics](https://www.cardstats.xyz/analytics): Review catalog-level network, funding-model, and card-model distributions.
- [Home](https://www.cardstats.xyz): Product overview and current research coverage.

## Card profiles

Card profiles use stable URLs under `https://www.cardstats.xyz/cards/{card-slug}`. A profile keeps plans, subscriptions, membership levels, and reward tiers inside one card program rather than publishing duplicate card entries.

## Data and sourcing

- Unknown values remain undisclosed rather than becoming zero.
- Issuer sources and scoped observations are linked from researched profiles.
- Promotions and time-limited benefits remain distinct from durable card economics.
- Card ordering is independent of commercial or affiliate status.
- Terms can change; users should open the linked issuer website before applying.

## Preferred citation

Use the canonical CardStats page URL and identify the specific card, plan or tier, region, and observation date when citing a value.
